assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with Authority set to the IdentityServer URL
Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
Program.cs sets TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType = 'name' and RoleClaimType = 'role'
Program.cs sets Audience or ValidAudience to 'catalog-api'
assertions.rationale: Both options.Audience and ValidAudience are set to 'catalog-api'.
